zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gwillim ap Aeddan於1125年出生在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾卡迪根時，他的父親Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont41歲，母親Anne verch Russell21歲。他和Gwenllian verch Hywel至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1161年在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Aeddan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Redden
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Redden in Sprouston (Roxburghshire). Early-medieval spellings like Reuenden suggest that the placename is from Old English hræfna denu ‘ravens' valley’.
English: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a patch of cleared woodland, from Middle English reden(e) (Old English ryden) ‘clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Gwillim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gwilliam
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gwillim ap Aeddan was born in 1125, in Cardigan, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont, was 41 and his mother, Anne verch Russell, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Gwenllian verch Hywel. He died in 1161, in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gwillim ap Aeddan est né en 1125, à Cardigan, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Anne verch Russell, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Gwenllian verch Hywel. Il est décédé en 1161, à Aberffraw, Anglesey, Galles, à l’âge de 36 ans.

Er hatte mit Gwenllian verch Hywel mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1161 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gwillim ap Aeddan(이)가 1125년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 카디건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne verch Russell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Gwenllian verch Hywel(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1161년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Enn ap Llwrch: ап, тимор тенгах утара, нуса тенгара тимур, Индонезия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gwillim ap Aeddan родился в 1125 г. в местности кардиган, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Aeddan ap Cydrych Arglwydd Grosmont было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Anne verch Russell, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Gwenllian verch Hywel. Он умер в 1161 г. в местности абирффрав, англеси, Уэльс в возрасте 36 лет.
